content: This is the second time, at least from what i've counted that an OST from the game is missing from these

embeds.title: Morimens OST- Pig-Headed Gentleman
embeds.description:
I absolutely love this game and it’s OST, but couldn’t find it anywhere on YouTube so I took it upon myself to upload some themes. 

This is the second unique theme found in Pickman’s anecdote.

Standout silly themes amidst this game’s somber tone and atmosphere are always welcome. The slightly fren
